# Owner Housing — Complete Property Listings

> This file contains the full listing data for Owner Housing, a property listing platform for India. All properties are listed directly by owners — no brokers, no commission. Data is current as of the latest build.

---

## 3 BHK Apartment in Six Mile, Guwahati

- **Price:** ₹75 Lakh
- **Category:** For Sale
- **Type:** Apartment
- **Area:** 1350 sqft
- **Configuration:** 3 Bedrooms, 2 Bathrooms
- **Furnishing:** Semi Furnished
- **Location:** Six Mile, Guwahati, Assam, 781022
- **Contact:** Bikash Baruah (Owner) — Phone: +917002689673
- **Posted:** 2026-05-22
- **URL:** https://ownerhousing.in/listing/3bhk-apartment-buy-sixmile-guwahati

Spacious 3BHK apartment on the 6th floor of a RERA-registered project in Six Mile, Guwahati. Features include a large drawing-cum-dining hall, modular kitchen with exhaust, 3 well-sized bedrooms with built-in wardrobes, 2 modern bathrooms with premium CP fittings, and a balcony overlooking the Brahmaputra river valley. Society amenities include earthquake-resistant RCC structure, 24/7 security with CCTV, backup generator, rainwater harvesting, children's play area, and covered two-wheeler parking. Walking distance to Lokpriya Gopinath Bordoloi International Airport road and GS Road. Schools like Don Bosco and Sarala Birla are within 3km.

**Amenities:** River View, Earthquake Resistant, RERA Registered, Covered Parking, Rainwater Harvesting, 24/7 Security, Children's Play Area

---

## 2 BHK Flat for Rent in Zoo Road

- **Price:** ₹18,000/month
- **Category:** For Rent
- **Type:** Apartment
- **Area:** 900 sqft
- **Configuration:** 2 Bedrooms, 1 Bathrooms
- **Furnishing:** Fully Furnished
- **Location:** Zoo Road, Guwahati, Assam, 781024
- **Contact:** Anjali Deka (Owner) — Phone: +917002689673
- **Posted:** 2026-05-20
- **URL:** https://ownerhousing.in/listing/2bhk-flat-rent-zoo-road-guwahati

Fully furnished 2BHK flat on Zoo Road, one of Guwahati's most vibrant localities. Comes with split AC in both bedrooms, double-door refrigerator, semi-automatic washing machine, LED TV, sofa set, dining table, and queen-size beds with mattresses. Kitchen equipped with gas stove, chimney, and basic utensils. Located on the 3rd floor with lift access. Near Assam State Zoo, Fancy Bazaar, and multiple ATMs and restaurants. Ideal for working professionals, couples, or small families. Water and Wi-Fi included in rent.

**Amenities:** Fully Furnished, AC, Wi-Fi Included, Lift, Near Zoo, Water Included

## Independent House in Chandmari, Guwahati

- **Price:** ₹1.85 Crore
- **Category:** For Sale
- **Type:** House
- **Area:** 2200 sqft
- **Configuration:** 4 Bedrooms, 3 Bathrooms
- **Furnishing:** Unfurnished
- **Location:** Chandmari, Guwahati, Assam, 781003
- **Contact:** Hemanta Sarma (Owner) — Phone: +917002689673
- **Posted:** 2026-05-18
- **URL:** https://ownerhousing.in/listing/independent-house-buy-chandmari-guwahati

Well-constructed independent house in the prime residential area of Chandmari, Guwahati. Built on a 3-katha plot with ground plus one floor. Ground floor has a large living room, dining area, kitchen, one bedroom with attached bath, and a covered car porch. First floor has 3 bedrooms (2 with attached bathrooms), a family lounge, and a spacious balcony. RCC structure with earthquake-resistant design, Assam-type wooden flooring on the first floor, and boundary wall with iron gate. Located on a 30-foot PWD road. Near Cotton University, Gauhati Medical College, and Pan Bazaar. Clear title with mutation done.

**Amenities:** Car Porch, Boundary Wall, RCC Structure, Earthquake Resistant, Clear Title, PWD Road

## Residential Plot near Airport, Azara

- **Price:** ₹35 Lakh
- **Category:** For Sale
- **Type:** Plot
- **Area:** 2160 sqft
- **Location:** Azara, Guwahati, Assam, 781017
- **Contact:** Ratul Kalita (Owner) — Phone: +917002689673
- **Posted:** 2026-05-15
- **URL:** https://ownerhousing.in/listing/residential-plot-buy-azara-guwahati

GMDA-approved residential plot (3 katha) in a developing area of Azara, just 2km from LGBI Airport. The plot is on a 20-foot concrete road with electricity and municipal water supply available. Flat topography, ideal for immediate construction. Surrounded by residential colonies with schools, market, and medical shops within 1km. 15 minutes from Lokhra industrial area and IIT Guwahati. Excellent investment opportunity as the area is rapidly developing with new flyover and metro rail projects planned. Dag and patta in order.

**Amenities:** GMDA Approved, Near Airport, Flat Land, Concrete Road, Water Supply, Electricity Available

## PG for Working Professionals in Christian Basti

- **Price:** ₹7,500/month
- **Category:** For Rent
- **Type:** Pg
- **Area:** 150 sqft
- **Configuration:** 1 Bedrooms, 1 Bathrooms
- **Furnishing:** Fully Furnished
- **Location:** Christian Basti, Guwahati, Assam, 781005
- **Contact:** Nandita Choudhury (Owner) — Phone: +917002689673
- **Posted:** 2026-05-23
- **URL:** https://ownerhousing.in/listing/pg-accommodation-rent-christian-basti-guwahati

Comfortable PG accommodation for working professionals in Christian Basti, a centrally located area of Guwahati. Both single and double sharing options available. Each room has a bed with mattress, wardrobe, study table, fan, and attached bathroom with geyser. Common amenities include a fully equipped kitchen, RO drinking water, Wi-Fi, washing machine, CCTV security, and a rooftop sitting area. Meals available on request (veg and non-veg). Walking distance to GS Road, Ganeshguri flyover, and multiple bus stops. Near offices of TCS, Wipro, and government secretariat.

**Amenities:** Meals Available, Wi-Fi, Geyser, CCTV, RO Water, Rooftop Area

## Commercial Office Space on GS Road

- **Price:** ₹45,000/month
- **Category:** For Rent
- **Type:** Office
- **Area:** 1100 sqft
- **Configuration:** 1 Bathrooms
- **Furnishing:** Semi Furnished
- **Location:** GS Road, Guwahati, Assam, 781005
- **Contact:** Pranab Bora (Owner) — Phone: +917002689673
- **Posted:** 2026-05-19
- **URL:** https://ownerhousing.in/listing/office-space-rent-gs-road-guwahati

Well-located commercial office space on the 4th floor of a prominent building on GS Road, Guwahati's main commercial corridor. The office can accommodate 20-25 workstations with a separate cabin for management, a conference room, pantry area, and attached washroom. Building has lift, 24/7 security, power backup, and ample visitor parking. Near Ganeshguri, Down Town Hospital, and multiple banks. Suitable for IT companies, consultancies, insurance offices, and co-working setups. Rent negotiable for long-term lease.

**Amenities:** GS Road Frontage, Lift, Power Backup, Conference Room, Visitor Parking, 24/7 Security

## Shop Space in Fancy Bazaar

- **Price:** ₹1.20 Crore
- **Category:** For Sale
- **Type:** Shop
- **Area:** 450 sqft
- **Furnishing:** Unfurnished
- **Location:** Fancy Bazaar, Guwahati, Assam, 781001
- **Contact:** Kamal Agarwala (Owner) — Phone: +917002689673
- **Posted:** 2026-05-14
- **URL:** https://ownerhousing.in/listing/shop-space-buy-fancy-bazaar-guwahati

Prime ground-floor commercial shop in Fancy Bazaar, the oldest and busiest wholesale and retail market hub of Guwahati. The shop has a 15-foot frontage on the main market lane with extremely high daily footfall. Ideal for garment shop, electronics store, general merchandise, or any retail business. Freehold property with clear title, mutation, and all GMC approvals in order. Near Guwahati Railway Station (1km), ASTC Bus Stand, and Paltan Bazaar. One of the most commercially valuable locations in entire Northeast India.

**Amenities:** Ground Floor, Main Market Lane, High Footfall, Freehold, Clear Title, Near Railway Station

## 2 BHK Apartment in AT Road, Jorhat

- **Price:** ₹38 Lakh
- **Category:** For Sale
- **Type:** Apartment
- **Area:** 850 sqft
- **Configuration:** 2 Bedrooms, 1 Bathrooms
- **Furnishing:** Unfurnished
- **Location:** AT Road, Jorhat, Assam, 785001
- **Contact:** Dipjyoti Hazarika (Owner) — Phone: +917002689673
- **Posted:** 2026-05-16
- **URL:** https://ownerhousing.in/listing/2bhk-apartment-buy-at-road-jorhat

Newly constructed 2BHK apartment on the 2nd floor of a 4-storey building on AT Road, Jorhat. The flat features a spacious living room, two comfortable bedrooms, a modern bathroom with tiles up to ceiling, and a kitchen with granite platform and dado tiles. Vitrified tile flooring throughout. The building has RCC construction with earthquake-resistant design, covered staircase, and overhead water tank with motor. Located on Jorhat's main commercial road with easy access to Jorhat Medical College, KK Handique Library, and Jorhat Gymkhana Club. Near Rowriah Airport (5km).

**Amenities:** New Construction, Vitrified Tiles, Earthquake Resistant, Near Airport, Main Road, Overhead Tank

## Independent House for Rent in Dibrugarh

- **Price:** ₹15,000/month
- **Category:** For Rent
- **Type:** House
- **Area:** 1400 sqft
- **Configuration:** 3 Bedrooms, 2 Bathrooms
- **Furnishing:** Semi Furnished
- **Location:** Graham Bazaar, Dibrugarh, Assam, 786001
- **Contact:** Pallabi Gogoi (Owner) — Phone: +917002689673
- **Posted:** 2026-05-21
- **URL:** https://ownerhousing.in/listing/independent-house-rent-graham-bazaar-dibrugarh

Well-maintained independent house available for rent in Graham Bazaar, a prime residential area of Dibrugarh — the Tea City of India. The house has 3 bedrooms (master bedroom with attached bath), a large living room, separate dining area, kitchen with LPG connection, and an additional bathroom. Comes semi-furnished with fans, tube lights, and curtain rods. Spacious front yard with garden space, covered parking for one car, and boundary wall. Near Dibrugarh University, Assam Medical College, and Dibrugarh Town railway station. Surrounded by tea gardens giving a serene environment.

**Amenities:** Garden Space, Covered Parking, Boundary Wall, Near University, Serene Location, LPG Connection

## Luxury Villa in Beltola, Guwahati

- **Price:** ₹3.20 Crore
- **Category:** For Sale
- **Type:** Villa
- **Area:** 3200 sqft
- **Configuration:** 5 Bedrooms, 5 Bathrooms
- **Furnishing:** Semi Furnished
- **Location:** Beltola, Guwahati, Assam, 781028
- **Contact:** Jyotirmoy Das (Owner) — Phone: +917002689673
- **Posted:** 2026-05-20
- **URL:** https://ownerhousing.in/listing/villa-buy-beltola-guwahati

Premium luxury villa in an upscale gated community in Beltola, South Guwahati. Built on a 5-katha plot with contemporary architecture. Ground floor features a grand double-height living room, formal dining, Italian modular kitchen, one bedroom suite, and a powder room. First floor has 3 bedroom suites each with walk-in closet and attached bathroom, plus a family room. Second floor has a master suite with private terrace, home office, and utility room. Private landscaped garden, 2-car garage, servant quarters, and rooftop party area. Gated community has clubhouse, swimming pool, and 24/7 manned security. Near Beltola Tiniali, South Point School, and Narengi Military Camp.

**Amenities:** Gated Community, Private Garden, Swimming Pool, Clubhouse, 2-Car Garage, Servant Quarters, Rooftop Terrace

- **Area:** 550 sqft
- **Configuration:** 1 Bedrooms, 1 Bathrooms
- **Furnishing:** Unfurnished

- **Contact:** Rishikesh Paul (Owner) — Phone: +917002689673
- **Posted:** 2026-05-19
- **URL:** https://ownerhousing.in/listing/1bhk-flat-rent-silchar-town

Affordable 1BHK flat on the 1st floor in Meherpur, Silchar. The flat has a bedroom, a small living area, kitchen with tiled platform, and a bathroom with Indian and Western commode. Fans and tube lights provided. The building has a concrete staircase and overhead water tank. Located in a peaceful residential neighborhood near Silchar Medical College, Meherpur Park, and Tarapur market. 3km from Silchar Railway Station and 7km from Kumbhirgram Airport. Ideal for students, medical interns, or bachelors.

**Amenities:** Affordable, Near Medical College, Peaceful Area, Overhead Tank, Tiled Kitchen, Western Commode

## Residential Plot in Tezpur

- **Price:** ₹18 Lakh
- **Category:** For Sale
- **Type:** Plot
- **Area:** 1440 sqft
- **Location:** Mahabhairab, Tezpur, Assam, 784001
- **Contact:** Mridul Bhuyan (Owner) — Phone: +917002689673
- **Posted:** 2026-05-13
- **URL:** https://ownerhousing.in/listing/residential-plot-buy-tezpur-town

Well-located residential plot (2 katha) in Mahabhairab area of Tezpur, known as the cultural capital of Assam. The plot has a gentle slope with a scenic view of the Eastern Himalayas on clear days. Connected to a 15-foot black-topped road with municipal water and electricity available at the site. Near Tezpur University (8km), Mahabhairab Temple, Kolia Bhomora Setu (bridge over Brahmaputra), and Da Parbatia archaeological site. The area has good schools including Darrang College and Tezpur Law College nearby. All land documents including dag, patta, and NOC from Deputy Commissioner are in order.

**Amenities:** Mountain View, Municipal Water, Black-topped Road, Near University, All Documents Clear, Scenic Location

---

## 3 BHK Apartment for Rent in Narengi

- **Price:** ₹25,000/month
- **Category:** For Rent
- **Type:** Apartment
- **Area:** 1250 sqft
- **Configuration:** 3 Bedrooms, 2 Bathrooms
- **Furnishing:** Semi Furnished
- **Location:** Narengi, Guwahati, Assam, 781026
- **Contact:** Rupam Medhi (Owner) — Phone: +917002689673
- **Posted:** 2026-05-22
- **URL:** https://ownerhousing.in/listing/3bhk-apartment-rent-narengi-guwahati

Well-maintained 3BHK apartment on the 4th floor in a gated residential complex in Narengi, Guwahati. The apartment has a spacious living-dining area, 3 bedrooms with wardrobes, 2 bathrooms with geysers, and a modular kitchen with chimney and RO water purifier. All rooms have ceiling fans and LED lights. Complex amenities include 24/7 security, power backup, covered parking, a community hall, and a small garden. Located near Narengi Army Cantonment, providing a safe and disciplined neighborhood. 10 minutes from Ganeshguri and 15 minutes from LGBI Airport. Schools like Army Public School and Kendriya Vidyalaya within 2km.

**Amenities:** Gated Complex, Modular Kitchen, Power Backup, Covered Parking, Geyser, RO Water

## Independent House in Nagaon Town

- **Price:** ₹55 Lakh
- **Category:** For Sale
- **Type:** House
- **Area:** 1600 sqft
- **Configuration:** 3 Bedrooms, 2 Bathrooms
- **Furnishing:** Unfurnished
- **Location:** Haibargaon, Nagaon, Assam, 782002
- **Contact:** Hiranya Nath (Owner) — Phone: +917002689673
- **Posted:** 2026-05-11
- **URL:** https://ownerhousing.in/listing/independent-house-buy-nagaon-town

Spacious independent house in Haibargaon, Nagaon — a well-connected town in central Assam. The house is built on a 2.5-katha plot with an Assam-type construction (RCC columns with lightweight walls for earthquake safety). Ground floor has 2 bedrooms, living room, kitchen, bathroom, and a front verandah. First floor has 1 bedroom, bathroom, and a large open terrace. Includes a kitchen garden area, tube well with motor, and space for 2 vehicles. Located on a PWD road near Nagaon Town railway station, Nagaon Civil Hospital, and Nowgong College. 2 hours from Guwahati via NH27.

**Amenities:** Assam-type Construction, Kitchen Garden, Tube Well, Open Terrace, PWD Road, Near Railway Station

## 2 BHK Flat in Paltan Bazaar, Guwahati

- **Price:** ₹52 Lakh
- **Category:** For Sale
- **Type:** Apartment
- **Area:** 780 sqft
- **Configuration:** 2 Bedrooms, 1 Bathrooms
- **Furnishing:** Unfurnished
- **Location:** Paltan Bazaar, Guwahati, Assam, 781008
- **Contact:** Manash Jyoti Saikia (Owner) — Phone: +917002689673
- **Posted:** 2026-05-17
- **URL:** https://ownerhousing.in/listing/2bhk-flat-buy-paltan-bazaar-guwahati

Centrally located 2BHK flat on the 3rd floor in Paltan Bazaar, the commercial heart of Guwahati. The flat has 2 bedrooms, a combined living-dining area, kitchen with tiles and granite slab, and a bathroom with geyser point. Mosaic flooring with RCC structure. The building is on a prime commercial road with excellent connectivity to Guwahati Railway Station (500m), ASTC Bus Stand (1km), Fancy Bazaar, and Machkhowa. Close to Assam Engineering College, Panbazaar Post Office, and Nehru Stadium. Ideal as both a residential property and an investment due to rapidly appreciating land values in the area.

**Amenities:** Prime Location, Near Railway Station, RCC Structure, Geyser Point, Commercial Area, Investment Opportunity

## Summary

- **Total Listings:** 15
- **Cities:** Guwahati, Jorhat, Dibrugarh, Silchar, Tezpur, Nagaon
- **For Sale:** 9 properties
- **For Rent:** 6 properties
- **Property Types:** apartment, house, plot, pg, office, shop, villa

All owners can be contacted directly via phone or WhatsApp. No broker commission is charged on any listing.
